description: A recap of Binance's achievements in 2024, highlighting user engagement, trading volume, and community contributions.
topic_summary: In 2024, Binance saw 245 million users choosing the platform, trading over $27 trillion. The Bitcoin ETF became the fastest selling in history, and Binance donated over $6 million to those in need. The exchange doubled the volume of the New York Stock Exchange and emphasized a welcoming approach to crypto and web3 [t=00:00].
